MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Jan-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court received an e mail from the moving party indicating that the case has settled, that the parties are in the process of signing the settlement documents and that a notice of settlement has been filed. Therefore, the Court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS HARD ROCK CAFE INTERNATIONAL (USA) INC., JOEL RAMOS AND BARRY CALES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues is off calendar at the request of the moving party.
